message: Really good service, quick and efficient

Azero is very talented and has a good eye for what kind of thumbnail works for the algorithm, He made me a thumbnail that got 32,638,884 impressions, with 705,991 plays. He's amazing he will make your player count sky rocket! if you have a good game. Hes deff recommended!
his guy got me an insanely high QPTR, averaging 3-4%. It sounds crazy and unreal. Responds fast, changes stuff when asked, just really good quality overall. Will definitely commission again.
Great GFX, very good price / cheap. Took very little time to receive and satisfied with results. Highly recommend!
